en: I just want to tell you how much I enjoyed your speech yesterday.
ko: 어제 네 연설 정말 좋았다고 말하고 싶었어.

en: You know, about family and being true to ourselves.
ko: 있잖아, 가족이랑 자기 자신에게 솔직해지는 거.

en: Oh, well, I'm glad it made an impact. Yeah.
ko: 아, 뭐, 영향을 줬다니 다행이다. 응.

en: I never want to look at Mom again. What happened?
ko: 엄마 다시는 보고 싶지 않아. 무슨 일이야?

en: Do you know she tried to set up my girlfriend with a man?
ko: 엄마가 내 여자친구를 남자랑 소개시키려고 했던 거 알아?

en: It has to stop. You know, that's not really what I was going for.
ko: 이제 그만해야 해. 있잖아, 내가 말하려던 건 그게 아니었는데.

en: Can I try out this yogurt?
First of all, I think it might be time for you to move out, you know?
ko: 첫째, 이제 독립할 때가 된 것 같아, 알지?

en: And secondly, you don't want to take any chances with yogurt.
ko: 둘째, 요거트는 함부로 먹으면 안 돼.

en: Mom, just let her throw it out.
